title: The inter ocean curiosity shop for the year 1883
author: Various; Jones, William P. [Editor]

quoteLast: when Dick Ffrench, hanging in a frenzy of anxiety over the paddock fence circling the inside of the mile oval, uttered something resembling a howl and rushed to the gate to signal his recreant driver.
title: The Flying Mercury
author: Ingram, Eleanor M. (Eleanor Marie), 1886-1921; Frederick, Edmund, 1870-1949 [Illustrator]; Stuart, Bertha, 1869-1953 [Illustrator]
